urdu transliteration text: Ali Ka Darwaza
Hai sheh r e ilm muhamad ali hai darwaza
english translation text: Muhammad is the city of knowledge, Ali is its door

urdu transliteration text: Kabhi jo shehr ki jaanib jo jana chaahoge
english translation text: If you ever want to approach the city...

urdu transliteration text: Qasam khuda ki jo dil me nahi hai hubbe ali
english translation text: ...and do not have the love of Ali in your heart

urdu transliteration text: To shehr e ilm ka darwaza band paaoge
english translation text: You will find the gate to the city of knowledge closed!

urdu transliteration text: Ali ka darwaza, Ali ka darwaza
english translation text: This is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Bhala azeem hai kitna ali ka darwaza
english translation text: How great is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Fazeelaton ne bhi dhoonda ali ka darwaza
english translation text: Even greatness was looking for the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Bhala azeem hai kitna ali ka darwaza
english translation text: How great is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text:
Khare the log bohot intenzaar me lekin
Sitara dekh ke utra ali ka darwaza
People were eagerly waiting in anticipation
english translation text: But the star only came down to the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Bhala azeem hai kitna ali ka darwaza
english translation text: How great is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Jo dushmanaane ali hai kahaan who jaayenge, Dar e jinna ape hai likha ali ka darwaza
english translation text:
The enemies of Ali, where will they go?
On the door of heaven, it is written, this is the door of Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Bhala azeem hai kitna ali ka darwaza
english translation text: How great is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Halaqaton se bachaane ke waste khudko, Fulaan fulaaan ne bhi dhoonda ali ka darwaza
english translation text:
To save themselves from annihilation.
Everyone was looking for the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Bhala azeem hai kitna ali ka darwaza
english translation text: How great is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Qasam hai khaan e kaaba tere tabasum ki, Khuda ke ghar pe bhi dekha ali ka darwaza
english translation text: I swear by the ‘smile’ (crack on the wall of the ka’aba) on the Holy Ka’aba. In the house of God also, we saw the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Bhala azeem hai kitna ali ka darwaza
english translation text: How great is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Nabi ke shehr me tum kis tarha se jaawoge, Ke raaste me parega ali darwaza
english translation text: How will you enter the city of the Prophet? As you will have to enter through the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Bhala azeem hai kitna ali ka darwaza
english translation text: How great is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Bilal buzar o salmaan sabhi khare the wahaan, Jo maine ghor se dekha ali ka darwaza
english translation text: Bilal, Abu Dhar, Salman - all were stood there. When I looked closely at the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Bhala azeem hai kitna ali ka darwaza
english translation text: How great is the door of Ali

urdu transliteration text: Ali ka darwaza, Ali ka darwaza
english translation text: This is the door of Ali
